title: Create: CC Better Recipes
description: Balances ComputerCraft by making its recipes require Create materials!
body:
## Summary
This mod balances ComputerCraft by making its recipes require Create materials!

## Requirements
This mod requires [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and [CC: Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked) (ComputerCraft), and currently only supports NeoForge 1.21.1.

## Credits
- Integrated Circuit and Lapis Sheet assets and recipes are from [the 0.3.1 version of Create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create/files/3278516).
- Original recipes from [CC: Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked).
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and [CC: Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked) logos are from those mods.
- Made using [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/).

## Usage in Modpacks
Feel free to include this mod in your modpacks!

## New Items
![New Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WZfuGM1m/images/4ff50eb6783e6216ca13c31e24fa0f4e0dd22df2.png)
_From left to right: Basic Integrated Circuit, Lapis Sheet, Integrated Circuit_
